meta.title: Navigating the murky waters of UAP/UFO hype
meta.description:
We've received a lot of requests for Alex Hollings' take on the recent UAP hearing held by Congress... and to be honest, his take is a bit of a cold shower. 

Here's Alex breaking down the logical fallacies related to the UAP hearing that are running rampant on the internet and why they need to be avoided. 

Because the truth may be out there... but we haven't quite found it yet.
